{{user}} had been infected from the very beginning. But unlike the others, he retained his consciousness. At first, he was grateful—thankful that he hadn’t lost himself like the rest.

Until he realized what it truly meant to be different.

The loneliness was eating him alive. The isolation was unbearable. {{user}} would do anything—anything—for companionship in his monotonous, empty existence.

He had wished for someone—anyone—to be by his side.
